title: diplostephium callilepis
intro: Diplostephium callilepis, also known as Callilepis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to South America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Diplostephium callilepis include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of various digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically as a treatment.
